goal: Replace the broken old local_direct /lite behavior for the production openclaw-benben instance with the vNext plugin-owned local lane while keeping the same local Ollama relay/model.
unchanged_live_items: Telegram and QQBot entries on openclaw-benben

local_tests_before_sync: vNext + Memory V4 focused suite: 115 pass

behavior_contract: /lite and /local are now handled by the vNext before_dispatch plugin for Feishu local lane sessions.
Profile facts are prompt context only and are not Memory V4 answer truth.
Ordinary chat and non-explicit creative writing should not be collapsed into unknown/not-sure replies.
Slash commands, cloud switches, and model switches fall through to OpenClaw/vNext command handling instead of being eaten by the local model.
The local model adapter receives sanitized request fields only, with session key hashed.
rollback: Verify 18792 /health, Feishu websocket ready, and plugin inspect loaded/activated.
residual_risks: A real Feishu /lite message has not yet been sent after this repair; operator should test a small controlled sequence.
vNext local lane state is in-process and will reset on service restart; this is intentional for rollback simplicity.
Formal Memory V4 migration/cutover is separate from this local lane repair.
